mapper.select: SELECT POLICY_ID AS policyId, TABLE_NAME AS tableName, POLICY_CODE AS policyCode, CHANGE_TYPES_JSON AS changeTypesJson, MASKING_PROFILE_CODE AS maskingProfileCode, SQL_RENDER_MODE AS sqlRenderMode, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn, POLICY_REASON AS policyReason, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, CREATED_BY AS createdBy, UPDATED_BY AS updatedBy FROM DB_CHANGE_PROMOTION_POLICY ORDER BY TABLE_NAME ASC

SELECT POLICY_ID AS policyId, TABLE_NAME AS tableName, POLICY_CODE AS policyCode, CHANGE_TYPES_JSON AS changeTypesJson, MASKING_PROFILE_CODE AS maskingProfileCode, SQL_RENDER_MODE AS sqlRenderMode, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn, POLICY_REASON AS policyReason FROM DB_CHANGE_PROMOTION_POLICY WHERE ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' AND UPPER(TABLE_NAME) = UPPER(#{_parameter}) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DB_CHANGE_PROMOTION_POLICY ( POLICY_ID, TABLE_NAME, POLICY_CODE, CHANGE_TYPES_JSON, MASKING_PROFILE_CODE, SQL_RENDER_MODE, ACTIVE_YN, POLICY_REASON, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{policyId}, #{tableName}, #{policyCode}, #{changeTypesJson}, #{maskingProfileCode}, #{sqlRenderMode}, #{activeYn}, #{policyReason}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE DB_CHANGE_PROMOTION_POLICY SET POLICY_CODE = #{policyCode}, CHANGE_TYPES_JSON = #{changeTypesJson}, MASKING_PROFILE_CODE = #{maskingProfileCode}, SQL_RENDER_MODE = #{sqlRenderMode}, ACTIVE_YN = #{activeYn}, POLICY_REASON = #{policyReason}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy} WHERE UPPER(TABLE_NAME) = UPPER(#{tableName})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG ( CHANGE_LOG_ID, TRACE_ID, REQUEST_ID, PROJECT_ID, MENU_CODE, PAGE_ID, API_PATH, HTTP_METHOD, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_ROLE, ACTOR_SCOPE_ID, TARGET_TABLE_NAME, TARGET_PK_JSON, ENTITY_TYPE, ENTITY_ID, CHANGE_TYPE, BEFORE_SUMMARY_JSON, AFTER_SUMMARY_JSON, CHANGE_SUMMARY, PROMOTION_POLICY_CODE, QUEUE_DECISION_CODE, QUEUE_REQUESTED_YN, QUEUE_ID, APPROVAL_REQUIRED_YN, APPROVAL_STATUS, CAPTURED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{changeLogId}, #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{projectId}, #{menuCode}, #{pageId}, #{apiPath}, #{httpMethod}, #{actorId}, #{actorRole}, #{actorScopeId}, #{targetTableName}, #{targetPkJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{changeType}, #{beforeSummaryJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{afterSummaryJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{changeSummary}, #{promotionPolicyCode}, #{queueDecisionCode}, #{queueRequestedYn}, #{queueId}, #{approvalRequiredYn}, #{approvalStatus}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO DEPLOYABLE_DB_PATCH_QUEUE ( QUEUE_ID, PROJECT_ID, SOURCE_CHANGE_IDS_JSON, TARGET_ENV, PATCH_FORMAT_CODE, PATCH_KIND_CODE, TARGET_TABLE_NAME, TARGET_KEYS_JSON, PATCH_PAYLOAD_JSON, RENDERED_SQL_PREVIEW, CHECKSUM_SHA256, RISK_LEVEL, APPROVAL_STATUS, APPLY_STATUS, BLOCK_REASON, APPROVED_BY, APPROVED_AT, REJECTED_BY, REJECTED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{queueId}, #{projectId}, #{sourceChangeIdsJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{targetEnv}, #{patchFormatCode}, #{patchKindCode}, #{targetTableName}, #{targetKeysJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{patchPayloadJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{renderedSqlPreview, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{checksumSha256}, #{riskLevel}, #{approvalStatus}, #{applyStatus}, #{blockReason}, #{approvedBy},
CURRENT_DATETIME null , #{rejectedBy}, null, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT PROJECT_ID AS projectId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter}) AS totalChangeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} AND QUEUE_DECISION_CODE = 'AUTO_QUEUED') AS autoQueuedChangeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} AND QUEUE_DECISION_CODE = 'APPROVAL_REQUIRED') AS approvalRequiredChangeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} AND QUEUE_DECISION_CODE = 'BLOCKED') AS blockedChangeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DEPLOYABLE_DB_PATCH_QUEUE WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} AND APPLY_STATUS = 'PENDING') AS pendingQueueCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DEPLOYABLE_DB_PATCH_QUEUE WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} AND APPROVAL_STATUS = 'PENDING') AS pendingApprovalQueueCount FROM PROJECT_REGISTRY WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} LIMIT 1

SELECT CHANGE_LOG_ID AS changeLogId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, PAGE_ID AS pageId, API_PATH AS apiPath, HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, TARGET_TABLE_NAME AS targetTableName, ENTITY_TYPE AS entityType, ENTITY_ID AS entityId, CHANGE_TYPE AS changeType, CHANGE_SUMMARY AS changeSummary, PROMOTION_POLICY_CODE AS promotionPolicyCode, QUEUE_DECISION_CODE AS queueDecisionCode, QUEUE_REQUESTED_YN AS queueRequestedYn, QUEUE_ID AS queueId, APPROVAL_REQUIRED_YN AS approvalRequiredYn, APPROVAL_STATUS AS approvalStatus, TARGET_PK_JSON AS targetPkJson, BEFORE_SUMMARY_JSON AS beforeSummaryJson, AFTER_SUMMARY_JSON AS afterSummaryJson, CAPTURED_AT AS capturedAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY CAPTURED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CHANGE_LOG_ID AS changeLogId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, PAGE_ID AS pageId, API_PATH AS apiPath, HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, TARGET_TABLE_NAME AS targetTableName, ENTITY_TYPE AS entityType, ENTITY_ID AS entityId, CHANGE_TYPE AS changeType, CHANGE_SUMMARY AS changeSummary, PROMOTION_POLICY_CODE AS promotionPolicyCode, QUEUE_DECISION_CODE AS queueDecisionCode, QUEUE_REQUESTED_YN AS queueRequestedYn, QUEUE_ID AS queueId, APPROVAL_REQUIRED_YN AS approvalRequiredYn, APPROVAL_STATUS AS approvalStatus, TARGET_PK_JSON AS targetPkJson, BEFORE_SUMMARY_JSON AS beforeSummaryJson, AFTER_SUMMARY_JSON AS afterSummaryJson, CAPTURED_AT AS capturedAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} AND TARGET_TABLE_NAME = #{targetTableName} ORDER BY CAPTURED_AT ASC, CREATED_AT ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT QUEUE_ID AS queueId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, SOURCE_CHANGE_IDS_JSON AS sourceChangeIdsJson, TARGET_ENV AS targetEnv, PATCH_FORMAT_CODE AS patchFormatCode, PATCH_KIND_CODE AS patchKindCode, TARGET_TABLE_NAME AS targetTableName, TARGET_KEYS_JSON AS targetKeysJson, PATCH_PAYLOAD_JSON AS patchPayloadJson, RENDERED_SQL_PREVIEW AS renderedSqlPreview, CHECKSUM_SHA256 AS checksumSha256, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, APPROVAL_STATUS AS approvalStatus, APPLY_STATUS AS applyStatus, BLOCK_REASON AS blockReason, APPROVED_BY AS approvedBy, APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt, REJECTED_BY AS rejectedBy, REJECTED_AT AS rejectedAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, CREATED_BY AS createdBy, UPDATED_BY AS updatedBy FROM DEPLOYABLE_DB_PATCH_QUEUE WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT RESULT_ID AS resultId, QUEUE_ID AS queueId, EXECUTION_BATCH_ID AS executionBatchId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TARGET_ENV AS targetEnv, EXECUTION_STATUS AS executionStatus, EXECUTION_MESSAGE AS executionMessage, RESULT_SQL_PREVIEW AS resultSqlPreview, CHECKSUM_SHA256 AS checksumSha256, DB_PATCH_HISTORY_ID AS dbPatchHistoryId, STARTED_AT AS startedAt, FINISHED_AT AS finishedAt, EXECUTED_BY AS executedBy, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM DEPLOYABLE_DB_PATCH_RESULT WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY STARTED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CHANGE_LOG_ID AS changeLogId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, TARGET_TABLE_NAME AS targetTableName, TARGET_PK_JSON AS targetPkJson, BEFORE_SUMMARY_JSON AS beforeSummaryJson, AFTER_SUMMARY_JSON AS afterSummaryJson, PROMOTION_POLICY_CODE AS promotionPolicyCode, QUEUE_ID AS queueId, CHANGE_TYPE AS changeType, CHANGE_SUMMARY AS changeSummary, API_PATH AS apiPath, HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, ENTITY_TYPE AS entityType, ENTITY_ID AS entityId FROM BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG WHERE CHANGE_LOG_ID = #{_parameter} LIMIT 1

SELECT QUEUE_ID AS queueId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, SOURCE_CHANGE_IDS_JSON AS sourceChangeIdsJson, TARGET_ENV AS targetEnv, PATCH_FORMAT_CODE AS patchFormatCode, PATCH_KIND_CODE AS patchKindCode, TARGET_TABLE_NAME AS targetTableName, TARGET_KEYS_JSON AS targetKeysJson, PATCH_PAYLOAD_JSON AS patchPayloadJson, RENDERED_SQL_PREVIEW AS renderedSqlPreview, CHECKSUM_SHA256 AS checksumSha256, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, APPROVAL_STATUS AS approvalStatus, APPLY_STATUS AS applyStatus, BLOCK_REASON AS blockReason, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM DEPLOYABLE_DB_PATCH_QUEUE WHERE QUEUE_ID = #{_parameter} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE BUSINESS_CHANGE_LOG SET QUEUE_REQUESTED_YN = #{queueRequestedYn}, QUEUE_ID = #{queueId}, QUEUE_DECISION_CODE = #{queueDecisionCode}, APPROVAL_REQUIRED_YN = #{approvalRequiredYn}, APPROVAL_STATUS = #{approvalStatus} WHERE CHANGE_LOG_ID = #{changeLogId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPLOYABLE_DB_PATCH_RESULT ( RESULT_ID, QUEUE_ID, EXECUTION_BATCH_ID, PROJECT_ID, TARGET_ENV, EXECUTION_STATUS, EXECUTION_MESSAGE, RESULT_SQL_PREVIEW, CHECKSUM_SHA256, DB_PATCH_HISTORY_ID, STARTED_AT, FINISHED_AT, EXECUTED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{resultId}, #{queueId}, #{executionBatchId}, #{projectId}, #{targetEnv}, #{executionStatus}, #{executionMessage}, #{resultSqlPreview, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{checksumSha256}, #{dbPatchHistoryId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{executedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME )
